title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 24
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two friends talking about a visit to a youth centre.
questions.audio_script: Girl: What did you do at the youth centre? I thought you were trying a photography class. || Boy: We planned to, but the teacher was ill. || Girl: Did you try dancing? || Boy: No, because the studio floor was wet. In the end, [1]we spent the afternoon doing a cooking class[/1]. It was more fun than I expected. || Girl: Maybe I’ll go next time. || Boy: You should. They lend you everything you need, and the staff are friendly. || Boy: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: What did you do at the youth centre? I thought you were trying a photography class.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: We planned to, but the teacher was ill.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Did you try dancing?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: No, because the studio floor was wet. In the end, we spent the afternoon doing a cooking class. It was more fun than I expected.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Maybe I’ll go next time.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: You should. They lend you everything you need, and the staff are friendly.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.question: What activity did the speaker do?

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, teenagers dancing in a studio, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost umbrella.
questions.audio_script: Boy: Have you found your umbrella yet? I know you were worried about it this morning. || Girl: Not really. I checked the bus stop, because I was sure I had it there after waiting for Jake. || Boy: And what about the bookshop? You went there afterwards, didn't you? || Girl: Yes, but nobody had seen it. Then the cinema assistant called and said [1]my umbrella was behind the ticket desk[/1]. I’m going to pick it up before it closes. || Boy: Great. At least you know where it is now, and you can stop looking everywhere.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Have you found your umbrella yet? I know you were worried about it this morning.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Not really. I checked the bus stop, because I was sure I had it there after waiting for Jake.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: And what about the bookshop? You went there afterwards, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, but nobody had seen it. Then the cinema assistant called and said my umbrella was behind the ticket desk. I’m going to pick it up before it closes.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Great. At least you know where it is now, and you can stop looking everywhere.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, umbrella beside a bookshop shelf, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the umbrella was behind the ticket desk.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on a day at the lake.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are you ready for the day at the lake tomorrow? I was going to pack my sandals, because it looked warm last week. || Girl: I saw the latest message from school. The main problem is showers in the afternoon. || Man: Should I take my scarf? || Girl: Not really. [1]The teacher said everyone should bring a raincoat[/1], because everyone must stay dry on the boat. || Man: Thanks. I’ll put that in my bag now, before I forget again. My bag is by the door already.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Are you ready for the day at the lake tomorrow? I was going to pack my sandals, because it looked warm last week.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I saw the latest message from school. The main problem is showers in the afternoon.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Should I take my scarf?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Not really. The teacher said everyone should bring a raincoat, because everyone must stay dry on the boat.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Thanks. I’ll put that in my bag now, before I forget again. My bag is by the door already.

questions.context: You hear a teacher giving information about the homework group.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Before you go, remember that the homework group is not in its usual place today. Some students thought it was in the library, but the library is closed for stock checking. Others may wait near the computer room, although all computers are booked. [1]Please go straight to the room eight at after registration[/1]. If your friend is absent this morning, send them a quick message so they do not arrive late. The teacher will start as soon as everyone is there.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Before you go, remember that the homework group is not in its usual place today. Some students thought it was in the library, but the library is closed for stock checking. Others may wait near the computer room, although all computers are booked. Please go straight to the room eight at after registration. If your friend is absent this morning, send them a quick message so they do not arrive late. The teacher will start as soon as everyone is there.

questions.explanation: The teacher says to go straight to the room eight.

questions.context: You hear an announcement for passengers travelling to Cambridge.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: Good afternoon. This is a message for passengers travelling to Cambridge. You may have seen the earlier notice asking you to wait near the car park A, but that information has changed. [1]Please go to the visitor centre now[/1]. Do not use the north gate, because the north gate is closed for painting. Staff will be nearby if you need help with luggage or directions. Please move carefully and keep your tickets ready for checking. Thank you for your patience today.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Good afternoon. This is a message for passengers travelling to Cambridge. You may have seen the earlier notice asking you to wait near the car park A, but that information has changed. Please go to the visitor centre now. Do not use the north gate, because the north gate is closed for painting. Staff will be nearby if you need help with luggage or directions. Please move carefully and keep your tickets ready for checking. Thank you for your patience today.

questions.explanation: The announcement says passengers should go to the visitor centre now.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a broken printer.
questions.audio_script: Man: Did anyone fix your printer? || Woman: Yes, but it wasn’t the problem I expected. I thought it was the paper tray, because it looked odd yesterday. || Man: Was it the ink bottle then? || Woman: I wondered that too, because the paper was not moving. Then someone checked it carefully and [1]the printer connected after Dad changed the USB cable[/1]. || Man: So it was quite simple. || Woman: Yes, luckily. I need it tonight, so I’m glad it is working again. || Woman: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did anyone fix your printer?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, but it wasn’t the problem I expected. I thought it was the paper tray, because it looked odd yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Was it the ink bottle then?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I wondered that too, because the paper was not moving. Then someone checked it carefully and the printer connected after Dad changed the USB cable.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: So it was quite simple.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, luckily. I need it tonight, so I’m glad it is working again.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, printer paper tray, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food at a snack bar.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you chosen what to eat at the snack bar? The queue is moving quickly. || Girl: I nearly chose the burger, but I promised to eat something healthy. || Man: What about the chips? It looks popular today. || Girl: I thought about it, but chips are too greasy. [1]I’m going to have the fruit salad[/1]. It should be enough before our journey. || Man: Good choice. I’ll order mine after you, and then we can find a table near the window. || Man: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Have you chosen what to eat at the snack bar? The queue is moving quickly.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I nearly chose the burger, but I promised to eat something healthy.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What about the chips? It looks popular today.

dialogue.speaker: girl

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good choice. I’ll order mine after you, and then we can find a table near the window.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.
